salvage_availability.instruction: SALVAGE SEARCH: No job available this campaign turn.
SALVAGE SEARCH: Job available, but requires 2 Credit non-refundable fee to accept.
SALVAGE SEARCH: Salvage job available! You can wait until after campaign actions before deciding.

SALVAGE SEARCH: Illegal salvage job available. After post-game Rivals roll, roll D6: 1-4 you got away with it; 5-6 authorities on trail (choose ONE: pay roll value in Credits, hand over all Salvage units, or add Enforcer Rival).

table_setup_rules:
SALVAGE TABLE SETUP:
- Interior floor plans, ruined colony, wrecked site, or abandoned cave complex.
- Ensure exits toward each battlefield edge if using floor plans.

SALVAGE MARKERS: Place 1D3+1 Salvage markers spread evenly.
- Any crew in contact picks up Salvage (1 unit). Set marker aside.
- Salvage does not need to be carried by specific character; cannot be lost.

POINTS OF INTEREST: Place 1 marker close to center of each battlefield quarter (4 total).
- Must investigate all 4 to complete mission.

DEPLOYMENT: Random edge. Split crew into 2 equal groups. Each placed:
- Within 2" of edge
- At least 10" between the two groups
- No roll to Seize the Initiative.
tension_rules:
TENSION TRACK:
- End of Round 1: Tension = ceil(crew_size / 2).
- Start of each round: Roll 1D6.
  - If roll ABOVE Tension: Tension +1.
  - If roll EQUAL or BELOW Tension: Tension reduced by the D6 value, and a Contact is spawned.

EXPLORATION ROUNDS:
- If no Contacts or enemies on board, it's an Exploration Round.
- No reaction roll. Crew moves in any order. Cannot Dash or use equipment.
contact_placement_rules:
CONTACT SPAWNING:
- Randomly select crew member.
- Place Contact at closest point NOT within 6" or LoS of any crew.
- If multiple locations tied, place closest to a Point of Interest.

CONTACT REVEAL — when within 6" and LoS, or within 3" of crew:
Roll D6 on Contact table.

contact_results.instruction: CONTACT: 'Beep, sir?' It was nothing. Remove marker.
CONTACT: 'Are you reading it right?' Select crew member with bad feeling. Remove marker. Tension +1.
CONTACT: 'Hostiles!' Encountered hostile forces. Roll on Hostiles! table if first contact.
CONTACT: 'We've got movement all over the place!' Scanner going haywire. Remove marker, spawn 2 new Contact markers near triggering crew member.

hostiles_table.instruction: HOSTILES: Free for All! Looters and renegades. Roll Criminal Elements table (core rules p.94). Enemies within one move of Salvage marker must move into contact, then remove BOTH marker and enemy.
HOSTILES: Toughs. Someone hired goons to guard the site. Roll Hired Muscle table (core rules p.96). Change Defensive or Cautious AI to Tactical.
HOSTILES: Rival Team. Another team is interested. Roll Interested Parties table (core rules p.99). Reduce Panic range by 1 (1-3→1-2, 1-2→1, 1→Fearless).
HOSTILES: Infestation! Worst type of job. Roll Roving Threats table (core rules p.101). Tension +6.

enemy_placement_rules:
ENEMY PLACEMENT:
- Place in Cover (if possible) on or within 1" of the Contact marker.
- Newly placed enemies cannot act in the round they appear.
contact_movement_rules:
CONTACT MOVEMENT (Enemy Actions phase, after all enemies act):
- Roll 2D6 in separate colors (or sequentially).
  - Dark die = Aggression. If highest: marker moves that many inches toward nearest crew.
  - Light die = Chance. If highest: marker moves that many inches in random direction.
  - If dice equal: marker remains in place.
- Contacts move around terrain. Halt at battlefield edge.
- If moving marker would be detected (within 6" LoS or 3"), resolve immediately. Enemies from that reveal cannot act this round.

poi_reveals.instruction: POI: Obstacle. Acid, radiation, or collapsing ceilings. Hazardous area extends 2" in every direction. All figures in area take Damage 0 hit (ignores Screens). Area remains dangerous for rest of battle. Enemies won't enter voluntarily. Tension -2.

POI: Environmental Threat. Crew member rolls 1D6+Savvy. On 5+: prevented leak. Otherwise: crew member and all figures within 1D6" take Damage 1 hit (ignores Screens). Danger does not remain. Tension -1.
POI: Map Readouts. Local map found. Randomly select a POI on table and move it 4" in any direction. Tension -1.
POI: Secure Device. Lockbox found. Place marker at POI location. Crew in contact: 1D6+Savvy (5+ opens it, grants Loot roll usable immediately). Each failed attempt: Tension +1.
POI: The Air Is Thick In Here. You keep thinking you heard something. Tension +3.
POI: Dead Spacer. Roll once on Loot table for useful kit. Can use immediately. Tension +1.
POI: We Need to Hurry. Best not to linger. Tension +1 for each remaining POI.
POI: Dead End. Nothing here. Tension -1.
POI: Information Station. Computer/library/diary found. Mark location. Crew in contact: 1D6+Savvy test. Reduce Tension by the modified Savvy die roll.
POI: Hot Find. Good salvage, but someone came through already. Receive 1D3 Salvage units. Tension +1 per Salvage unit just found.
POI: Survivors Discovered! Place 1D3 Hardened Colonists (core rules p.172). Fight alongside you. If at least 1 survives or exits, claim +1 Story Point. Tension +2.
POI: Hornets' Nest. Scanner beeping like crazy. Place Contact marker near revealing crew member. Tension -2.
POI: Lure? Dangerous but tempting. Place Contact randomly 6" from crew. When crew contacts it: D6 — 1-3 place Contact markers equal to roll, 4-6 receive Salvage units equal to roll. Tension -1.
POI: All Clear. Abandoned for some time. Tension -3.

POI: Incursion! The Converted are here. 6-figure Converted Acquisition team (core rules p.101: 4 basic, 1 specialist, 1 lieutenant) arrives from random edge at start of next round. Fights both sides. Can reveal Contacts same as you. Ignores POI. If already fighting Converted: these are reinforcements joining existing foes. Tension -3.
POI: Cache. Small pile of interesting scrap. Receive 1D3 Salvage units. No Tension change.

POI: Security Bot! Crew rolls 1D6+Savvy. 6+: shut down before activation. Natural 6: reprogram to fight on your side (AI controlled, can't keep after). Fail: place Mk II Security Bot (core rules p.107) — shoots both sides, moves first in Enemy Action phase. Tension -2.

POI: Creature! Sand Runner (core rules p.107) hops out. Place on POI. Crew rolls 1D6+Savvy (5+ it likes you, fights on your side, Reaction 3. Bots/Soulless: -3 to roll. Swift: +1). Fail: hostile, attacks both sides. No Tension change.

POI: Rival Trap! It was all a set-up. Randomly select a Rival — 6 of them (4 basic, 1 specialist, 1 lieutenant) arrive from random edge at start of next round. Remove ALL enemy figures and Contact markers. Tension permanently set to 0. If NO Rivals: ignore event, Tension +3 instead.
POI: Valuable Find. Goods worth 1D3+1 Credits. No Tension change.
POI: Interesting Find. After mission, make a Loot roll. No Tension change.

POI: Evac Time! Site unstable/collapsing. Danger area extends 1" radius from POI. End of every future round: extends 1D6" in every direction. All figures and Contact markers caught are casualties. POI caught are destroyed. Tension -10.

POI: Doomsday Protocol! Nano-swarm doomsday device! Place Contact marker at POI location representing swarm. End of every round: moves 1D6" toward nearest figure (crew, enemy, or Contact). If contact: target destroyed (crew become casualties) and another swarm spawns, moving immediately. Cannot be destroyed or blocked by any defensive device. Tension -10.

salvage_value_rules:
SALVAGE POST-MISSION (Compendium pp.146-148):
1. POI COMPLETION REWARD: For each POI investigated, roll 1D6:
   1-4: Nothing found.
   5: Gain 1 Salvage unit.
   6: Roll on Discovery D100 table.
2. DISCOVERY D100: 01-40 Roll on Loot table, 41-70 +1 Salvage unit,
   71-85 +1 Quest Rumor, 86-100 +1D3 Credits.
3. SCRAPPERS: Roll 3 times on the Loot table. Each item costs 1D6
   Salvage units (minimum 2). Pay Salvage to claim the item.
4. SALVAGE AS CURRENCY: 1 Salvage unit = 1 Credit toward ship repairs,
   ship modules, or bot upgrades ONLY (cannot be sold for cash).
5. Illegal job payoff check happens after normal Rival determination.
